summary: Verified backend key prices and new price-sort toggle on Store. Backend: 9/9 pytest passed. Frontend: All 5 keys have correct INR prices, keys asc/desc/default sort works, sort state is shared across ranks/keys/bundles, currency toggle (inr/usd) works alongside sort, and buy button opens QR payment modal (visible with ETERNAL KEY ₹199.00).
critical_code_review_comments: Sort state is shared across all three sections by design; UX might be clearer with per-section sort but that's a product decision.
PaymentModal in Store.jsx has no data-testid on the dialog root — added test relied on inner text ('scan' / 'upi'). Consider adding data-testid='payment-modal' for more robust tests.
seed_data_creation: None - MongoDB reseed via SEED_VERSION=4 confirmed working (returned 199/179/140/100/1 prices).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Key data-testids: {section}-currency-inr/usd, {section}-sort-default/asc/desc where section is ranks|keys|bundles. Grids: #ranksGrid, #keysGrid, and bundles grid (no id).
